comment: Hand-authored copy rewrites for the precomputed demo, written at build time against the real printed descriptions. Rule: reframe only what the menu already states — never invent ingredients.

rewrites.Traditional Fish & Chips: Crisp, golden beer-battered cod over proper chips with mushy peas — the Dockside classic.
rewrites.Teriyaki Salmon: Teriyaki-glazed salmon resting on stir-fried vegetables, with steamed rice.
rewrites.Homemade Steak and Guinness Pie: Chunky beef slow-simmered in rich Guinness gravy under a crisp pastry lid, with mash and veg.
rewrites.Smash Burger: Crisp-edged smash patty with melted cheese, bacon and BBQ sauce, lettuce and tomato — chips included.
rewrites.Fillet Steak: Our most tender cut from the grill, with chips, salad and homemade peppercorn sauce.
rewrites.Espresso Martini: Espresso shaken ice-cold with vodka and coffee liqueur.
rewrites.Giant Rack of Sticky Ribs: A giant rack glazed in our homemade BBQ sauce, with chips and salad — bring napkins.
rewrites.Homemade Lasagna: Layers of fresh ground beef, creamy cheese sauce and pasta sheets, served with chips.
